name: WorldBuilder Context
description: Injects WorldBuilder knowledge graph context into SillyTavern conversations using 2-hop graph distance for precise, anti-OOC prompt injection.
author: WorldBuilder

worldbuilder_url.label: WorldBuilder API URL
worldbuilder_url.description: The base URL of your WorldBuilder backend

project_id.label: Project ID
project_id.description: Your WorldBuilder project ID (auto-detected if empty)

max_hop.label: Max Hop Distance
max_hop.description: How many hops to traverse in the knowledge graph for context injection

injection_position.label: Injection Position
injection_position.description: Where to inject the graph context in the prompt
